details.necessary_desc: Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

about.title: About cookies
about.text: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. Skaldly only uses strictly necessary cookies — no tracking or advertising.

languages.clickToExplore: Click on a language to explore its topics and lessons.

home.page_title: Skaldly - Learn a Language with Artificial Intelligence
home.page_description: Learn a new language with artificial intelligence: flashcards, quizzes and interactive exercises. An AI assistant to help you progress at your own pace.
home.page_keywords: learn a language with AI, learn a language with artificial intelligence, language learning app, flashcards, language quiz, AI language assistant, Skaldly

hero.description: Skaldly is the platform to learn a language with AI: spaced repetition, custom lessons and total immersion through artificial intelligence.

scientific.title: Scientific Learning
scientific.description: Our lessons are based on proven cognitive studies. Spaced repetition ensures long-term memory retention.

ai.title: AI to learn a language
ai.description: Pedagogy that adapts in real time. Artificial intelligence evaluates your weaknesses and generates perfect content to help you progress.

variety.title: Diverse Tools
variety.description: Flashcards, quizzes, matching pairs, sorting exercises and interactive challenges — designed to maximize linguistic retention and total immersion.

science.title: Proven by Science
science.subtitle: To learn a language effectively, Skaldly draws on decades of cognitive science research, amplified by artificial intelligence.

spaced_repetition.title: 1. Flashcards & Spaced Repetition to memorize vocabulary
spaced_repetition.description: Without review, the brain naturally forgets 78% of information (Ebbinghaus forgetting curve). Spaced repetition forces active recall just before forgetting, maximizing memorization via long-term potentiation.

dual_coding.title: 2. Visual Pairs & Dual Coding Theory
dual_coding.description: Processing information simultaneously through visual and verbal channels (like in pair-matching games) creates multiple retrieval pathways in the brain.
dual_coding.stat2_desc: retention compared to text without visual context (Paivio, 1971).

testing_effect.title: 3. Quizzes & Testing Effect
testing_effect.description: Retrieval Practice is superior to passive study. Well-calibrated quizzes force information discrimination, directly consolidating memory traces well beyond simple assessment.

chunking.title: 4. Conceptual Sorting & Chunking
chunking.description: Natural working memory caps around 7 items (Miller's Law). Sorting exercises require strong semantic encoding, allowing information grouping (Chunking).
chunking.stat1: Transfers information from saturated short-term memory to structured semantic memory.

sources.title: Sources & Study References:
sources.source1: (1885). Memory: A Contribution to Experimental Psychology. The Spacing Effect consistently prevents forgetting at rates of 80%+ versus less than 25% without repetitions.
sources.source2: (1971). Imagery and verbal processes. Dual coding theory. Evidence shows text-imagery pairs stimulate crossed memory pathways.
sources.source3: (2006). Test-enhanced learning. The Testing Effect using quizzes produces better retrieval capacities than simple re-reading.
sources.source4: (1956). The magical number seven, plus or minus two, and Semantic Encoding (Craik & Lockhart, 1972). Chunking changes the hierarchy of mental storage regarding language learning.

languages.title: Learn the language of your choice with AI
languages.subtitle: Skaldly supports many languages to learn with artificial intelligence

items.question: How does Skaldly work to learn a language with artificial intelligence?
items.answer: Skaldly offers varied exercises to learn a language: flashcards, quizzes, matching pairs and interactive exercises. When you get stuck on a word or grammar rule, the AI assistant steps in real time to explain the grammar rule, suggest a mnemonic trick, flag a common pitfall or provide usage context.

items.question: How long does it take to learn a language with Skaldly?
items.answer: Results vary depending on the language and your starting level. Thanks to spaced repetition and AI algorithms, our users see significant progress within the first weeks of regular use.

items.question: Is Skaldly free?
items.answer: Yes, Skaldly offers a free version to start learning a language with AI. Advanced features are available with our Premium subscriptions.

items.question: Which languages can you learn with Skaldly?
items.answer: Skaldly offers learning for many languages: English, Spanish, Japanese, German, Italian, Portuguese, Arabic and many more. All benefit from artificial intelligence assistance.

cta.title: Start learning a language with artificial intelligence
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners using AI to progress faster.

0.title: Mnemonic tip
0.explanation: Imagine a samurai greeting you at midday. The word breaks down as: "Kon" (this) + "nichi" (day) + "wa" (particle). Literally: "As for this day…"
0.visual_anchor: A samurai under the midday sun saying "Konnichiwa" while bowing

1.title: Usage context
1.explanation: "Manzana" means apple but also a city block in Latin America. Very common in both senses depending on context.

2.title: Rule & Structure
2.explanation: "Arigatou" (ありがとう) is the informal form. To be polite, say "Arigatou gozaimasu". The level of politeness depends on the context and your interlocutor.

qcm_demo.question: How do you say 'Thank you' in Japanese?
qcm_demo.feedback: Arigatou (ありがとう) means "Thank you" in Japanese.

sorting_demo.placeholder: Put the words in the right order…

interactive_demo.success: Correct answer! « Je veux apprendre les langues. »

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Cookie policy for the Skaldly service.

what.title: 1. What is a cookie?
what.p1: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. It stores information related to your browsing and preferences.

used.title: 2. Cookies used by Skaldly
used.intro: Skaldly uses only strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the service. No analytical or marketing cookies are placed.

manage.title: 3. Manage your preferences
manage.p1: The cookies used by Skaldly are strictly necessary for the operation of the service and cannot be disabled. You can however reset your consent preferences by clicking below.

more.title: 4. Learn more
more.p1: For more information about cookies, visit the website of the

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.description: These cookies are essential for the platform to function. They manage your authentication and session preferences.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.description: Terms and Conditions of Sale for the Skaldly service.

object.title: 1. Purpose
object.p1: These Terms and Conditions of Sale define the rights and obligations of Skaldly and its customers in the context of subscribing to Skaldly plans.

products.title: 2. Products and Services
products.p1: Skaldly offers monthly and annual subscriptions providing access to all premium features of the platform. The characteristics of each offer are available on the

pricing.title: 3. Pricing and Payment
pricing.item1: Prices are listed in euros including all taxes.
pricing.item2: Payment is made online via our secure provider Stripe.
pricing.item3: Subscriptions are automatically renewed at each billing period.
pricing.item4: Skaldly reserves the right to change its prices with 30 days' notice.

withdrawal.title: 4. Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.p1_before: In accordance with article L.221-18 of the Consumer Code, the consumer has a period of
withdrawal.p1_after: from the date of subscription to exercise their right of withdrawal, without having to provide any reason.
withdrawal.p2: To exercise this right, contact us at:
withdrawal.note: Note: if you have started using the service during this period having expressly waived your right of withdrawal, a proportional partial refund will be calculated.

termination.title: 5. Termination
termination.p1: The subscription can be canceled at any time from the account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period. No refund will be made for the period already paid, except in the exercise of the right of withdrawal.

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.p1: Skaldly commits to providing the service with the best possible level of availability but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. In the event of prolonged unavailability attributable to Skaldly, compensation (subscription extension) may be granted.

law.title: 7. Applicable Law and Disputes
law.p1: These Terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, an amicable solution will be sought first. Failing that, French courts will have jurisdiction.

data.title: 2. Data Collected
data.identity_val: last name, first name, username, email address

data.payment_val: managed exclusively by Stripe (we do not store your bank details), subscription history
data.security_val: passwords are hashed (bcrypt) and are never readable, even by our team

retention.tokens_val: revoked immediately upon logout or account deletion

recipients.intro: Your data may be shared with our subcontractors in the context of providing the service:

rights.title: 6. Your Rights

rights.access_val: (Art. 15) — obtain a copy of your data
rights.portability_val: (Art. 20) — receive your data in a structured format
